name: Orlan-MKS
best_known_for: The latest variant of the Orlan family — Russian rear-entry EVA suit, in service since the 1977 Salyut program
credit: Latest generation of the Orlan rear-entry EVA suit family that began with Salyut 6 in 1977. The cosmonaut steps in through a backpack-mounted hatch that locks shut in one motion — no airlock pre-breathe gymnastics. Runs at 5.7 psi pure O₂, higher than the US EMU. Used on the ISS Russian segment.
